_note: Backup of fabricated 'Maple Elementary' test data removed from m.haslim@gmail.com (user_id 5cfaea4a-5318-460d-ba9d-18e42bfa73d2) user_memory.preferences.lifemapState on 2026-06-16. All content was synthetic test input from a functional-verification run, not real family data. To restore: update user_memory set preferences = jsonb_set(preferences, '{lifemapState}', '<backup below>'::jsonb) where user_id = '5cfaea4a-5318-460d-ba9d-18e42bfa73d2';

lifemapState.intake: Hi families! Reminder: Maple Elementary field trip to the Science Museum is Friday June 26. Permission slip + $12 cash due to the front office by Wed June 24. Bus leaves 8:15am sharp, return ~3pm. Pack a peanut-free lunch. Also picture day order forms are due next Monday. Nurse needs Liam's updated immunization record on file before the trip. Questions: office@mapleelem.org
